chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-2669 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.12255/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 7 3. For order on Misc. No.12256/2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 11.8.2025 Mr. Arif Awan advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-4. This petition involves an alleged illegal construction on Plot No.25, 35 yards multi story without approval map from the Sindh Building Control Authority (SBCA). Learned counsel for the petitioner at the first instance shall file his complaint under the Smart Complaint Redressal Mechanism (SCRM). In the event he does so, the SBCA shall deal with his complaint according to their own SOPs and the law. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Director General, SBCA for information. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
